name: agent-ready-cli
description: Generate product CLIs from OpenAPI specs with local self-host testing support.

scripts.generate:example: node dist/index.js generate --spec examples/petstore/openapi.yaml --name pet-cli --out generated/pet-cli.js
scripts.generate:enterprise: node dist/index.js generate --spec examples/enterprise/openapi.yaml --name enterprise-cli --out generated/enterprise-cli.js
scripts.e2e:example: node generated/pet-cli.js pet list-pets --base-url http://localhost:4010 --output json
scripts.e2e:docker: npm run docker:up && npm run generate:example && node generated/pet-cli.js pet list-pets --base-url http://localhost:4010 --output json; STATUS=$?; npm run docker:down; exit $STATUS
